name: I-Play
about:
Digital Bridges was founded in 1998 in Dunfermline, with the ambition of providing a set of new entertainment content channels for wireless device users. They soon developed and published mobile games as well through their wholly-owned subsidiary Wireless Games.

In 2001 the company announced the opening of its North American offices, located in New York City and in San Francisco, and later branded as I-Play.

In 2007, Oberon Media acquired the company, and integrated I-Play as a publishing division, re-launching the brand.
